ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the facility is located */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the process or facility type */,
  "installed_capacity" REAL /* Installed capacity of the facility */,
  "capacity_lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the capacity */,
  "capacity_upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the capacity */,
  "max_gradient" REAL /* Maximum gradient for capacity changes */,
  "min_fraction" REAL /* Minimum fraction of capacity that must be maintained */,
  "investment_cost" REAL /* Investment cost for the facility */,
  "fixed_cost" REAL /* Fixed operational cost */,
  "variable_cost" REAL /* Variable operational cost */,
  "startup_cost" REAL /* Startup cost for the facility */,
  "wacc" REAL /* Weighted average cost of capital (WACC) */,
  "depreciation" REAL /* Depreciation period */,
  "area_per_capacity" REAL /* Area required per unit of capacity */,
  "energy_type" TEXT /* Type of energy produced (e.g., solar, wind, gas) */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Detailed location description (e.g., coordinates, address) */,
  "weather_pattern" TEXT /* Weather pattern at the facility location */,
  "grid_connection_status" TEXT /* Status of grid connection (e.g., connected, disconnected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "site_manager" TEXT /* Name of the site manager */,
  "site_address" TEXT /* Detailed address of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process type */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the process type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the process type */,
  "technology" TEXT /* Technology used in the process */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the cost is associated with */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the cost */,
  "investment_cost" REAL /* Investment cost for the facility */,
  "fixed_cost" REAL /* Fixed operational cost */,
  "variable_cost" REAL /* Variable operational cost */,
  "startup_cost" REAL /* Startup cost for the facility */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Maintenance cost for the facility */,
  "insurance_cost" REAL /* Insurance cost for the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_costs_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the metric is associated with */,
  "wacc" REAL /* Weighted average cost of capital (WACC) */,
  "depreciation" REAL /* Depreciation period */,
  "return_on_investment" REAL /* Return on investment (ROI) for the facility */,
  "payback_period" REAL /* Payback period for the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capacity_constraints" (
  "constraint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capacity constraint record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the constraint is associated with */,
  "installed_capacity" REAL /* Installed capacity of the facility */,
  "capacity_lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the capacity */,
  "capacity_upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the capacity */,
  "max_gradient" REAL /* Maximum gradient for capacity changes */,
  "min_fraction" REAL /* Minimum fraction of capacity that must be maintained */,
  "ramp_up_time" REAL /* Ramp-up time for the facility */,
  "ramp_down_time" REAL /* Ramp-down time for the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constraint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capacity_constraints_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "area_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area requirement record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the requirement is associated with */,
  "area_per_capacity" REAL /* Area required per unit of capacity */,
  "land_use_type" TEXT /* Type of land use (e.g., agricultural, urban) */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Environmental impact of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_requirements_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, financial analyst, operations manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the facility */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the facility was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the version is associated with */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, deletion) */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_versions_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance schedule record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the schedule is associated with */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, corrective) */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance is scheduled */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_schedules_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the production is associated with */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of energy production */,
  "energy_produced" REAL /* Amount of energy produced */,
  "production_unit" TEXT /* Unit of energy production (e.g., MWh, GWh) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the weather is associated with */,
  "weather_date" TEXT /* Date of weather data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the facility location */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the facility location */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the facility location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the compliance is associated with */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of regulatory compliance */,
  "regulation_type" TEXT /* Type of regulation (e.g., environmental, safety) */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)
